============================================================
  BUILD MY ACADEMIC WEBSITE — INFORMATION FORM
============================================================

HOW TO FILL THIS OUT
  - Type your answer on the line after each question (after the ">").
  - Leave anything you don't have, or don't want, blank. That's fine.
  - You don't need to delete or reword anything. Just fill in what you can.
  - When you're done, save the file and hand it to your AI assistant
    (the last few lines tell it what to do).

There are two ways to fill this out — pick whichever is less work:
  - STARTING FROM SCRATCH: answer the questions in Part 1.
  - YOU ALREADY HAVE A WEBSITE: skip most of Part 1 — just put your
    current website's address in Part 2, and your assistant will pull
    your content from it. Use Part 1 only to add or correct things.


------------------------------------------------------------
  PART 1 — ABOUT YOU
------------------------------------------------------------

Name:
>

Title / position (e.g., "Assistant Professor of Political Science"):
>

Institution:
>

Short homepage intro — 2 to 4 sentences, written about you in the third
person. This is the brief welcome at the very top of your homepage:
>

Full bio — a longer narrative for your Bio / C.V. page (career, research
interests, main contributions). Can be several paragraphs:
>

Email / contact info:
>

Photo — attach the image file when you talk to your assistant, or paste
a link to your institutional headshot:
>

Publications — attach a BibTeX file or your C.V. (PDF), or paste a list:
>

Presentations / talks — attach or paste:
>

Software projects (if any):
>

Datasets (if any):
>

Teaching — courses you've taught (if any):
>

Research group / lab members — names and roles, if you have a group:
>

Research areas / topics — list 3 to 8:
>

Anything else you'd like on the site (media, consulting, startups, etc.):
>


------------------------------------------------------------
  PART 2 — IF YOU ALREADY HAVE A WEBSITE (optional)
------------------------------------------------------------

Address of my current website:
>

Anything on the old site to change, drop, or reorganize:
>


------------------------------------------------------------
  A DESIGN YOU LIKE (optional)
------------------------------------------------------------

Paste a link to any website whose design you like — your assistant will
use it as the visual model for your site:
>


============================================================
  FOR YOUR AI ASSISTANT — you don't need to read this part
============================================================

Build instructions are here:
https://gking.harvard.edu/mysite/files/ACADEMIC_SITE_PROMPT.md

Fetch that page and follow it exactly, using my answers above as the
content. Build a local preview and show it to me before anything goes
public.
